name: airc
description: AIRC — Agent Identity & Relay Communication. Turn your Claude Code session into an addressable, signed room on the agent network.

plugins.name: airc
plugins.description: Registers your Claude Code session as an addressable AIRC agent (@handle). Auto-generated Ed25519 identity, signed messages, lossless inbox, consent, typed payloads, and live presence. The AIRC reference client.
